nodes.name: ArchitectureDocumentParser
nodes.description: Parse CLAUDE.md, ARCHITECTURE_GUIDE, DEVELOPER_ONBOARDING from docs/architecture/

nodes.name: DesignDecisionExtractor
nodes.description: Extract design decisions with problem/solution/tradeoff, assign curriculum tier

nodes.name: CrossReferenceExtractor
nodes.description: Extract flow and service cross-references from architecture documents

nodes.name: RagPatternGenerator
nodes.description: Generate RAG patterns from architecture rules with archetype and keywords

nodes.name: DpoTripleGenerator
nodes.description: Create DPO triples (instruction, preferred, dispreferred) for model training

nodes.name: KnowledgeBaseBootstrapper
nodes.description: Store all extracted data: DR records, RAG patterns, DPO triples, cross-references

nodes.name: OutboxPublisher
nodes.description: Emit CloudEvents to queue fabric after all storage (DNA-8 outbox pattern)
